meta.source: Census 2021 base + ONS SNPP population envelope + differential fertility model
meta.methodology: Applies group-specific TFR-based growth rates constrained to ONS SNPP total population projections. Religion trends based on observed 2011-2021 national shifts.
caveats: Projections are modelled estimates, not official ONS forecasts
Assumes continuation of current fertility and migration patterns
Ward-level projections have higher uncertainty than council-level
Religion projections assume continuation of national secularisation trend

insights.desc: No religion projected to grow by 9.8pp by 2032
Pharos projected as most ethnically diverse ward by 2032 (index: 0.563)
